analyses.result_summary: feature_003 had a linear-probability slope of -0.0004021 per 1-unit increase in the feature (two-sided z p=1.00e-300).

analyses.code: Linear probability model: objective_response ~ feature
analyses.result_summary: feature_063 had a linear-probability slope of -0.005564 per 1-unit increase in the feature (two-sided z p=1.00e-300).

iterations.update: Continuous features with negative slopes were carried forward into thresholded subgroup analyses.
